series_metadata.series_title: Appointed Counsel and Public Defender Reimbursemen
series_metadata.series_description: Reimbursement backup tapes for A.C. & P.D. are used for the purpose of restoring files to system in case of system failure.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Backups of files are conducted on a daily and monthly basis and these will be retained pursuant retention schedules MIS-01 (daily) and MIS-02 (monthly)
